---
title: "机器学习辅助的中国行业 ETF 轮动研究"
subtitle: "低频配置框架、正则化排序与回测审查"
author: "课程期末展示稿"
date: "2026-06-24"
lang: zh-CN
bibliography: references.bib
format:
  html:
    output-file: classroom_report.html
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: right
    number-sections: false
    theme: none
    css: report.css
    smooth-scroll: true
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: false
    fig-align: center
    title-block-style: none
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

{{< include classroom_report_body.md >}}
